disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden onset of severe unilateral (left) ocular surface pain and foreign-body sensation while reading in front of a fan this evening
trigger_question_examples: When and how did this start?
Which eye, and what were you doing when it began?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on all of a sudden tonight in my left eye while I was reading with a fan blowing on my face — it feels like there's crushed glass under the lid.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe photophobia — light in the room is intolerable, wearing sunglasses indoors
trigger_question_examples: How are your eyes with light?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The light is agonizing — I've got sunglasses on inside just to cope.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profuse reflex tearing from the affected eye
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's streaming with tears constantly — I keep dabbing it with a tissue.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Background of gritty, mildly light-sensitive eyes associated with a controlled autoimmune thyroid condition; ran out of artificial tears yesterday
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any eye or thyroid conditions?
Do you normally use any eye drops?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got a thyroid condition that's supposed to be controlled and it makes my eyes gritty; I use artificial tears but I ran out yesterday.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No contact lens wear, no chemical splash, and no direct blunt injury to the eye reported
trigger_question_examples: Did anything hit or splash into the eye?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't wear contacts and nothing splashed or hit the eye — I was just reading.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The patient is frightened of permanent structural damage or going blind
trigger_question_examples: What are you most worried about?
How are you coping with this tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm terrified I've done real damage or that I'm going to lose my sight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No thick coloured/purulent discharge and no sudden drop in the sharpness of vision reported by the patient (vision limited by pain, not by loss of clarity)
trigger_question_examples: Is there any yellow or green pus?
Has your actual eyesight — how clearly you can see — dropped, separate from the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No pus that I've noticed. I can't really open it to test my sight because it hurts so much, but I don't think my vision itself has gone blurry.
